title: Tim Cooper Joins Operation Homefront's National Board of Directors Operation Homefront, a leading national military nonprofit dedicated to serving America's military families, has elected Walmart Senior Vice President of Supply Chain Operations and U.S. Army veteran Tim Cooper to its national board of directors. With nearly 30 years of experience in supply chain management, and primary responsibility for the nation's largest grocery distribution network, along with 10 years of military service, Cooper is an accomplished leader and a decorated combat veteran.

Mad Genius Unleashes Flavor Mashup Snacks in the Frozen Aisle, Now at Walmart Mad Genius Snack Lab is shaking up the frozen aisle with its flavor-fueled mashups now available at Walmart. The new lineup reinvents classic comfort foods like quesadillas, snack rolls, and empanadas by infusing them with globally inspired flavors. From spiced street food twists to unexpected fusion favorites, each snack is a bold, crave-worthy combination designed to surprise and satisfy.

Bandai Invites You to Blast Off to Tamagotchi Paradise Ever since Tamagotchi pets appeared on Earth in 1996, hundreds of thousands of these adorable characters have found loving homes with humans. For the first time ever, Tamagotchi Paradise – the next device in the brand's rich history – will take fans on an interstellar journey, where the quintessential Tamagotchi play gives birth not only to a beloved new character…but an entire Tamagotchi Planet! New Owner of Bentonville, Arkansas Pak Mail Provides Innovative Outlook in Shipping, Freight, and Office Services in the Neighborhood of Walmart's Global Headquarters Annex Brands, Inc., a leading franchisor in the packing, shipping, and office services industries, is pleased to announce the successful transfer of ownership of an existing Pak Mail location in Bentonville, AR to new owners, Jeff and Laura Hairston. The community will benefit from the essential shipping, freight, and office services offered at this Pak Mail location of 21 years.

RASCALS LAUNCHES NIGHT PANTS, PREMIUM NIGHTTIME UNDERWEAR Rascals, the award-winning, Walmart-exclusive diaper and training pants brand, is excited to introduce Night Pants, a new premium line of nighttime underwear for children aged 4-15 navigating bedwetting. Available now at Walmart stores and online across the U.S. and Canada, Night Pants are designed to help families feel more in control of their nights by providing dependable overnight protection that parents and children can rely on.

Despite tariff reprieve, Lesotho says it is already hurting MASERU (Reuters) -A reprieve from a 50% U.S. tariff on goods from Lesotho has come too late to prevent damage to the tiny African kingdom's textiles industry, which has been hit hard by months of trade uncertainty, officials and industry players said.  Lesotho's tariff rate was slashed to 15% in last week's executive order by U.S. President Donald Trump, down from the level of 50% tariff threatened in April - which was the highest of any U.S. trading partner.  Textile industry players in the country - which produces jeans and other garments for popular U.S. brands such as Levi's and Walmart - said the uncertainty around tariffs over the past few months had already devastated the sector, with orders cancelled and jobs cut.
